usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural adversarial test — not a user experience evaluation. All 10 validation and error-handling test cases passed. The API correctly distinguishes INVALID_ARGUMENT (malformed input) from NOT_FOUND (valid-but-missing resources), enforces buf.validate constraints on string lengths and UUID formats, rejects invalid status transitions with FAILED_PRECONDITION, handles idempotent deletes gracefully, and returns empty collections without errors. No panics, no 500s, no missing validation constraints detected.

test_01_gettrip_nonexistent_uuid.notes: Correct error code and message. No panic or 500.

test_02_gettrip_malformed_id.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID
test_02_gettrip_malformed_id.notes: Validation interceptor correctly catches malformed UUID before business logic.

test_03_createtrip_empty_title.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at least 1 characters

test_04_createtrip_oversized_title.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at most 512 characters

test_05_invalid_status_transition.actual: failed_precondition: invalid trip status transition: completed -> planning
test_05_invalid_status_transition.notes: State machine properly enforced. Uses FAILED_PRECONDITION code which is semantically correct.

test_06_sendmessage_empty_content.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_06_sendmessage_empty_content.notes: buf.validate min_len constraint enforced on streaming RPC.

test_07_sendmessage_oversized_content.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at most 10000 characters

test_08_deletebooking_nonexistent.notes: Idempotent delete behavior. Acceptable — no error, no panic.

test_09_ingestbooking_empty_rawtext.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: raw_text: value length must be at least 1 characters

test_10_listtrips_zero_trips.expected: Successful response with empty trips array
test_10_listtrips_zero_trips.actual: Successful response with pagination:{} and no trips array (empty collection)
test_10_listtrips_zero_trips.notes: Correctly returns success with empty result, not NOT_FOUND.
